ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the brand belongs to */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "last_audited" TEXT /* Date the brand's information was last audited for accuracy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "last_audited" TEXT /* Date the category's information was last audited for accuracy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or identifier of the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last synced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance score entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the score belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the score is from */,
  "fact_date" TEXT /* Date the performance score was recorded */,
  "overall_score_365" REAL /* Overall score for the last 365 days */,
  "overall_score_90" REAL /* Overall score for the last 90 days */,
  "overall_score_30" REAL /* Overall score for the last 30 days */,
  "overall_score_14" REAL /* Overall score for the last 14 days */,
  "overall_score_7" REAL /* Overall score for the last 7 days */,
  "overall_score_1" REAL /* Overall score for the last 1 day */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total sales volume for the given time frame */,
  "customer_reviews" REAL /* Average customer review score */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Percentage of products returned */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Average profit margin */,
  "inventory_turnover" REAL /* Inventory turnover rate */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, brand manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the history entry belongs to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_history_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the history entry belongs to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_history_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the history entry belongs to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access log the history entry belongs to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_history_access_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_id") REFERENCES access_logs ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance score the history entry belongs to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES performance_scores ("score_id")
)
